file_system_id.description: Specifies the ID of the EFS file system for which the mount target will be created; must be an existing file system ID.

ip_address.description: Specifies the IPv4 address within the subnet for the mount target. Must be a valid, unused address within the subnet's CIDR block.

security_groups.description: Specifies the IDs of the security groups to associate with the mount target. At least one security group must be specified.

subnet_id.description: ID of the subnet in which to create the mount target; must be within the VPC of the file system.

timeouts.description: Specifies the timeouts for creating, updating, and deleting the EFS mount target, with constraints on format as a map including keys 'create', 'update', and 'delete', each accepting a duration string (e.g., "30m" for 30 minutes).
